# Security.ElicitationUserDecision enumeration

The terminal user decision on a server-initiated elicitation (spec §28.7, R-28.7-b, R-28.7-c).

```csharp
public enum ElicitationUserDecision
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Approve | `0` | The user approved the request. |
| Edit | `1` | The user edited and approved the request. |
| Decline | `2` | The user declined the request. |
| Cancel | `3` | The user cancelled the request. |
